creator: oleglelchuk@gmail.com
text:
xdg-desktop-portal-kde will crash if I try to take a screenshot with flameshot in the plasma wayland environment:

Application: xdg-desktop-portal-kde (xdg-desktop-portal-kde), signal: Segmentation fault
